overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The clip transitions from a covered concrete pedestrian corridor with neon-lit bars to an open plaza featuring a large cylindrical digital billboard and surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian transit corridor with neon-lit commercial stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor following a person with distinctive yellow and red striped hair

notable_agents.action: person with striped hair walking ahead, leading the way through the corridor
group sitting at high tables near the FERVID bar, engaged in conversation

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete ceiling and walls forming a covered pedestrian walkway
illuminated billboard displaying 'FERVID' brand with fashion imagery
cyan and purple lit bar counter with stools and seated patrons
massive rectangular concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective following a character through a covered concrete pedestrian corridor. Neon lights in cyan and purple illuminate a bar area on the left with the FERVID brand visible. Several pedestrians are present, some walking ahead and others seated at high tables. The environment is distinctly cyberpunk with brutalist architecture and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from covered walkway to open plaza with ascending stairs

events.description: exits the covered concrete structure into the open urban plaza, revealing night sky and tall buildings
begins ascending concrete stairs leading up to the main plaza level

agents.ego_description: following the striped-haired character up the concrete stairs into the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: character with striped hair climbing the stairs ahead

entered.detail: large rotating cylindrical structure displaying multiple digital advertisements
wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to plaza level
high-rise residential towers with illuminated windows surrounding the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered corridor into a transitional space where the night sky becomes visible above. A massive cylindrical digital billboard dominates the center of the approaching plaza. The character ascends a wide concrete staircase while the environment shifts from enclosed to open, with towering glass buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital advertising tower and food vendors

events.description: reaches top of stairs and continues walking through the open plaza
passes by food vendor stalls and rotating digital advertisement displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past various pedestrians and commercial stalls, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near illuminated food cart with various items on display
person sitting on bench near the enjoy brand advertisement kiosk

entered.detail: illuminated vertical kiosk displaying 'enjoy!' brand with facial imagery and beverage
small commercial stall with glowing display and various goods
blue-lit elevated structure running above the plaza level

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in an open urban plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. The camera moves past a food vendor cart on the left and a brightly lit 'enjoy!' advertisement kiosk on the right. The cylindrical digital billboard rotates in the background displaying various advertisements. The environment is distinctly cyberpunk with neon lighting, elevated transit structures, and a mix of commercial signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a vast, open urban plaza dominated by towering skyscrapers. It begins by following a character through a brutalist concrete walkway, where cyan and purple neon lights illuminate a FERVID branded bar and scattered pedestrians. As the camera exits the covered corridor, the space opens up to reveal the night sky and a massive cylindrical digital billboard centered in the distance. The scene then expands as the character ascends a wide concrete staircase, shifting the perspective from the enclosed walkway to a wide plaza filled with glass buildings and elevated transit structures. Finally, the camera glides past a food vendor and a brightly lit enjoy! kiosk while the rotating billboard continues to cast a glow over the commercial signage of the futuristic city.
